items.title: What it feels like to pull off a World Cup upset: ...
items.summary: Paraguay's win over Germany in the round of 32 is the latest World Cup shock in a long line of them, including famous upsets like Ireland over Italy in 1994 and Norway over Braz...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Serena hurt knee vs. Joint, trying to play doubles...
items.summary: Serena Williams' status to play in women's doubles at Wimbledon is uncertain after she suffered a knee injury during her first singles match in nearly four years.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Hridoy to lead Bangladesh in Zimbabwe T20Is; Saifuddin makes comeback
items.summary: Litton Das, Mehidy Hasan Miraz, Taskin Ahmed and Hasan Mahmud will be playing in the Lanka Premier League, which overlaps with the T20I series
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
